confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete this course?

join.title: Get your lab repository
join.description: Sign in with GitHub. The service will create a private repository from the template or restore access to an existing repository.
join.successDescription: Open the repository. If the invitation is still pending, GitHub will offer to accept it on that page.

errors.oauthDenied: You cancelled GitHub authorization. You can try again.
errors.oauthFailed: GitHub could not confirm the sign-in. Start authorization again.
errors.oauthUnavailable: GitHub is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.oauthNotConfigured: The teacher has not configured GitHub sign-in for this service yet.
errors.oauthStateMissing: GitHub returned without the original sign-in data. Return to the lab link and try again.
errors.oauthStateInvalid: The sign-in data is damaged or was changed. Return to the lab link and start again.
errors.oauthStateExpired: The GitHub sign-in has expired. Return to the lab link and try again.
errors.oauthStateMismatch: This GitHub response belongs to another or completed sign-in. Return to the lab link and start again.
errors.notFound: The course or lab was not found. Check the link.
errors.notConfigured: A template repository has not been configured for this lab.
errors.templateUnavailable: The template repository is not accessible to the server. Contact the teacher.
errors.repositoryFailed: The repository could not be created or checked. Please try again.
errors.accessFailed: The repository is ready, but its current invitation could not be checked. Please try again.
errors.invitationFailed: The repository invitation could not be sent. Try later or contact the teacher.
errors.rateLimit: GitHub temporarily limited requests or invitations. Please try again later.
errors.githubUnavailable: GitHub could not be reached. Check the connection and try again.
errors.invalidRepositoryLink: The server returned an invalid repository link. Start again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or contact the teacher.
